channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RELIGARE] Religare EGM on May 5, 2026 to approve shifting Registered Office
item.description:
Religare Enterprises Ltd. announced an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on May 05, 2026, at 11:00 A.M. IST via virtual conferencing. The key agenda for the EGM is to seek shareholder approval through a Special Resolution for shifting the company's Registered Office from the National Capital Territory of Delhi to the State of Haryana. This move will also require a consequential amendment to Clause II of the Memorandum of Association. The company will provide remote e-voting facilities from May 01 to May 04, 2026, with April 28, 2026, as the cut-off date for shareholder eligibility.

  • EGM on May 05, 2026, to approve office relocation.
  • Company plans to shift registered office to Haryana.
  • Shareholders to vote on Memorandum of Association amendment.
  • Remote e-voting available from May 01 to May 04, 2026.
  • April 28, 2026, is the cut-off date for voting eligibility.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIGARE ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [RDEL] Riddhi Display clarifies share price movement is market driven
item.description:
Riddhi Display Equipments Ltd responded to a BSE email dated April 10, 2026, which sought clarification regarding significant movement in the company's equity share price. The company informed the exchange that it has made all necessary and timely disclosures in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Riddhi Display confirmed that no material information or impending announcement that could impact the share price or volume has been withheld. The company attributed the observed significant price movement to purely market-driven factors and reiterated its commitment to inform stock exchanges of any price-sensitive information as required.

  • BSE sought clarification on Riddhi Display's significant share price movement.
  • Company confirmed timely disclosures as per SEBI Regulation 30.
  • No material information has been withheld from the exchanges.
  • Riddhi Display stated share price movement is purely market driven.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Riddhi Display Equipments Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [GSPCROP] GSP Crop Science Board Approves Q3/9M FY26 Results & ₹2,365 Lakh Land Sale
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GSP Crop Science Limited's Board of Directors met on April 11, 2026, to approve the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. Additionally, the Board approved the sale/transfer of industrial land measuring 66,740.60 square meters to a promoter group company, Indo GSP Chemicals Private Limited, for a consideration of ₹2,365 lakhs. The financial results included a Limited Review Report from the statutory auditors.

  • Board approved unaudited Q3 and nine-month financial results for FY22.
  • Industrial land of 66,740.60 sq. meters sold to a promoter group company.
  • Sale consideration for the land was ₹2,365 lakhs.
  • Statutory auditors provided a Limited Review Report on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GSP Crop Science Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RBLBANK] RBL Bank to hold EGM on May 4, 2026, for AOA amendment
item.description:
RBL Bank Limited announced an Extra-ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 11 a.m. (IST) via video conferencing or other audio-visual means. The primary agenda for the EGM is to consider and pass a special resolution for the amendment of the Bank's Articles of Association. This amendment aims to grant a special right regarding director nomination to an identified shareholder of the Bank. The cut-off date for determining eligibility for remote e-voting and voting at the EGM is April 27, 2026. The remote e-voting period will commence on April 29, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. (IST) and conclude on May 3, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. (IST). Mr. S N Viswanathan has been appointed as the Scrutinizer for the voting process.

  • EGM scheduled for May 4, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Agenda includes amending AOA for director nomination rights.
  • Cut-off date for e-voting eligibility is April 27, 2026.
  • Remote e-voting period is from April 29 to May 3, 2026.
  • Scrutinizer appointed to ensure a fair voting process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RBL Bank Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [DITCO] Decorous Investment: Reg 32 & 15(2) Not Applicable for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Decorous Investment & Trading Co Ltd confirmed the non-applicability of SEBI (LODR) Regulation 32 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as there were no public, rights, preferential, or QIP issues, and no deviation in IPO proceeds. The company also stated that Regulation 15(2), pertaining to certain corporate governance provisions, is not applicable. This is due to its Paid-up Share Capital being less than ₹10 Crores and Net Worth less than ₹25 Crores as of March 31, 2026, and March 31, 2025. The company submitted other quarterly compliances including the Reconciliation of Share Capital Audit Report (Reg 76), Shareholding Pattern (Reg 31), Corporate Governance Report (Reg 27(2)), Investors’ Complaints Status (Reg 13(3)), Insider Trading Compliance Certificate (Reg 3(5) & 3(6)), and a certificate under Reg 74(5) from its RTA. Additionally, the company confirmed its website is active and functional as per Reg 46 and that Reg 57(5) regarding non-convertible securities is not applicable.

  • Regulation 32 (deviation in issue proceeds) is not applicable to the company.
  • Regulation 15(2) (corporate governance) is not applicable due to company size.
  • Paid-up capital is below ₹10 Cr and net worth below ₹25 Cr as of March 2025/2026.
  • Other quarterly compliances, including shareholding pattern, were submitted.
  • No non-convertible securities issued, making Reg 57(5) inapplicable.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Decorous Investment & Trading Co Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PCCOSMA] Pee Cee Cosma Sope: Nominee Shareholder Change in Subsidiary
item.description:
Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd's Executive Committee approved a change in nominee shareholders for its wholly-owned subsidiary, India Trading Infra Limited, on April 11, 2026. Three outgoing nominees (Divya Jain, Ankit Jain, Shivangi Jain) holding one equity share each were replaced by three incoming nominees (Stuti Jain, Samayak Jain, Shikha Jain) also holding one equity share each. The company clarified that this is an administrative change, with no impact on beneficial ownership, the subsidiary's wholly-owned status, or its control/shareholding pattern.

  • Pee Cee Cosma Sope changed nominee shareholders for its wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • Three outgoing nominees were replaced by three new nominees, each holding one share.
  • The change is administrative and does not affect beneficial ownership or control.
  • India Trading Infra Limited remains a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PEE CEE COSMA SOPE LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [VGIL] Veer Global Board to meet on April 14 for loan clarification
item.description:
Veer Global Infraconstruction Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for April 14, 2026, at 11:00 A.M. via VC/OAVM. The key agenda items include considering and approving a revision and clarification regarding outstanding unsecured loans, which were previously disclosed in connection with a proposed preferential issue of equity shares. The Board will also approve the issuance of a corrigendum to the Notice of Extraordinary General Meeting to reflect these updated particulars. Additionally, the meeting will ratify and confirm all actions and decisions taken by the Board and reconfirm the receipt and terms of unsecured loans.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 14, 2026.
  • Agenda includes clarifying unsecured loans for preferential issue.
  • Corrigendum to EGM notice to be approved for updated particulars.
  • Board to ratify past actions and reconfirm unsecured loan terms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veer Global Infraconstruction Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SOMANYCERA] Somany Ceramics gets NCLT order for amalgamation scheme
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Somany Ceramics Limited has received the First Motion Order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, regarding the Scheme of Amalgamation. The scheme involves the merger of Somany Bathware Limited, Somany Excel Vitrified Private Limited, and SR Continental Limited (Transferor Companies) with Somany Ceramics Limited (Transferee Company). The NCLT pronounced the order on April 9, 2026, and uploaded it on April 10, 2026. As per the order, meetings of equity shareholders and unsecured creditors of Somany Ceramics will be convened on Saturday, June 13, 2026, via video conferencing. The NCLT has dispensed with the meetings of equity shareholders and unsecured creditors of the Transferor Companies, as well as secured creditors of both Transferor and Transferee Companies.

  • NCLT Kolkata Bench issued First Motion Order for amalgamation scheme.
  • Somany Ceramics to merge with Somany Bathware, Somany Excel, and SR Continental.
  • Meetings for Somany Ceramics' equity shareholders and unsecured creditors scheduled for June 13, 2026.
  • NCLT dispensed with meetings for other creditors and transferor companies' shareholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOMANY CERAMICS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [FABCLEAN] Fabtech Technologies secures ₹9.82 Cr orders in March 2026; order book at ₹199.21 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd. secured consolidated orders worth ₹9.82 crore in March 2026, primarily driven by the Pharma sector (₹7.67 crore) and Renewable Energy (₹2.13 crore). Cleanroom Partitions contributed ₹7.49 crore and HVAC Systems ₹2.33 crore to these new orders. As of March 31, 2026, the company's consolidated order book stands at ₹199.21 crore, with Renewable Energy accounting for ₹117.08 crore and Pharma for ₹41.95 crore. Additionally, orders under active consideration total ₹482 crore, with major opportunities in Renewable Energy (₹296.10 crore) and Pharma (₹164.71 crore). The company continues to strengthen its presence across high-growth sectors, demonstrating strategic diversification and capability in integrated cleanroom and HVAC solutions.

  • Secured ₹9.82 crore consolidated orders in March 2026.
  • Pharma (₹7.67 Cr) and Renewable Energy (₹2.13 Cr) led new orders.
  • Consolidated order book reached ₹199.21 crore by March 31, 2026.
  • Renewable Energy dominates order book at ₹117.08 crore.
  • Orders under active consideration total ₹482 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [B2BSOFT] B2B Software Q4/FY26 Results: Reports Net Loss of ₹302.92 Lakhs
item.description:
B2B Software Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 11, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For the year ended March 31, 2026, the company reported a profit before tax of ₹302.92 Lakhs (loss) and a profit for the period of ₹302.92 Lakhs (loss). Additionally, the Board appointed Ms. Srijani Sarkar, a Chartered Accountant, as the Internal Auditor for the company for the financial year 2026-27. Ms. Sarkar brings expertise in auditing, financial reporting, and taxation across various industries, with a focus on robust internal controls and process optimization.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and full FY26.
  • Company reported a net loss of ₹302.92 Lakhs for FY26.
  • Ms. Srijani Sarkar appointed as Internal Auditor for FY2026-27.
  • Sarkar is a Chartered Accountant with significant audit experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: B2B SOFTWARE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
